Schmidt AI in Science Speaker Series
Fellows are fully engaged in several initiatives geared towards scholarly and networking enrichment at the University of Chicago. To this effect, they are organizing a yearly Schmidt AI in Science Speaker Series parading both local and external presenters who are expert researchers routinely using Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools and Machine Learning (ML) to design and conduct their research experiments in their specific field.
Agenda 4:00pm – 4:45pm: Presentation 4:45pm – 5:00pm: Q&A 5:00pm – 5:30pm: Reception
Location: William Eckhardt Research Center, Room 401
Here is the list of dates when speakers will present for the Fall 2025 – Spring 2026 Schmidt AI in Science Speaker Series:
[2024 – 2025 Seminar Speakers](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/events/2024-2025-schmidt-ai-in-science-speaker-series/)

Fellows are fully engaged in several initiatives geared towards scholarly and networking enrichment at the University of Chicago. # Schmidt AI in Science Speaker Series
Fellows are fully engaged in several initiatives geared towards scholarly and networking enrichment at the University of Chicago. To this effect, they are organizing a yearly Schmidt AI in Science Speaker Series parading both local and external presenters who are expert researchers routinely using Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools and Machine Learning (ML) to design and conduct their research experiments in their specific field.
Agenda 4:00pm – 4:45pm: Presentation 4:45pm – 5:00pm: Q&A 5:00pm – 5:30pm: Reception
Location: William Eckhardt Research Center, Room 401
Here is the list of dates when speakers will present for the Fall 2025 – Spring 2026 Schmidt AI in Science Speaker Series:
[2024 – 2025 Seminar Speakers](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/events/2024-2025-schmidt-ai-in-science-speaker-series/)
